submodules.name: System.Numerics Core
submodules.description: Contains types such as BigInterger and Complex.

submodules.name: System.Numerics.Vector<T>
submodules.description: Provides Vector<T> that represents a single vector of a specified numeric type that is suitable for low-level optimization of parallel algorithms.

submodules.name: System.Numerics
submodules.description: Provides types in the the System.Numerics (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.numerics) namespace, such as BigInterger and Vector<T>.
